narration: Most exoplanets are invisible — we find them by watching stars wobble and dim.
visual_description: Hook visual: Most exoplanets are invisible — we find them by watching stars wobble and dim.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Most exoplanets are invisible — we find them by watching stars wobble and dim.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Most exoplanets are invisible — we find them by watching stars wobble and dim.

narration: Two main methods help us: the transit method and radial velocity.
visual_description: Context visual: Two main methods help us: the transit method and radial velocity.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Two main methods help us: the transit method and radial velocity.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Two main methods help us: the transit method and radial velocity.

narration: The transit method tracks a star's light, looking for dimming as a planet crosses.
visual_description: Escalation visual: The transit method tracks a star's light, looking for dimming as a planet crosses.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: The transit method tracks a star's light, looking for dimming as a planet crosses.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: The transit method tracks a star's light, looking for dimming as a planet crosses.

narration: Meanwhile, radial velocity detects tiny wobbles in a star's position caused by a planet's gravity.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Meanwhile, radial velocity detects tiny wobbles in a star's position caused by a planet's gravity.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Meanwhile, radial velocity detects tiny wobbles in a star's position caused by a planet's gravity.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Meanwhile, radial velocity detects tiny wobbles in a star's position caused by a planet's gravity.

narration: These methods have helped discover thousands of exoplanets, revealing a universe full of possibilities.
visual_description: Payoff visual: These methods have helped discover thousands of exoplanets, revealing a universe full of possibilities.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: These methods have helped discover thousands of exoplanets, revealing a universe full of possibilities.
